2604.11259.title: Mobile GUI Agent Privacy Personalization with Trajectory Induced Preference Optimization
2604.11259.paper_summary: Mobile GUI agents powered by Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) can execute complex tasks on mobile devices. Despite this progress, most existing systems still optimize task success or efficiency, neglecting users' privacy personalization. In this paper, we study the often-overlooked problem of agent personalization. We observe that personalization can induce systematic structural heterogeneity in execution trajectories. For example, privacy-first users often prefer protective actions, e.g., refusing permissions, logging out, and minimizing exposure, leading to logically different execution trajectories from utility-first users. Such variable-length and structurally different trajectories make standard preference optimization unstable and less informative. To address this issue, we propose Trajectory Induced Preference Optimization (TIPO), which uses preference-intensity weighting to emphasize key privacy-related steps and padding gating to suppress alignment noise. Results on our Privacy Preference Dataset show that TIPO improves persona alignment and distinction while preserving strong task executability, achieving 65.60% SR, 46.22 Compliance, and 66.67% PD, outperforming existing optimization methods across various GUI tasks. The code and dataset will be publicly released at https://github.com/Zhixin-L/TIPO.
2604.11259.paper_summary_zh: 行動 GUI 代理由多模態大型語言模型 (MLLMs) 驅動，可以在行動設備上執行複雜任務。儘管取得了這些進展，大多數現有系統仍然優化任務成功或效率，忽略了用戶的隱私個性化。在本文中，我們研究了經常被忽視的代理個性化問題。我們觀察到，個性化可能會在執行軌跡中引發系統性的結構異質性。例如，重視隱私的用戶通常偏好保護性行為，例如拒絕權限、登出和最小化曝光，這導致與重視效用的用戶在邏輯上有不同的執行軌跡。這種變長且結構上不同的軌跡使得標準偏好優化不穩定且信息量較少。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了軌跡誘導偏好優化 (TIPO)，該方法使用偏好強度加權來強調關鍵的隱私相關步驟，並使用填充閘來抑制對齊噪聲。我們在隱私偏好數據集上的結果顯示，TIPO 改善了個性對齊和區分，同時保持了強大的任務可執行性，達到 65.60% 的成功率、46.22 的合規性和 66.67% 的偏好區分，超越了各種 GUI 任務中的現有優化方法。代碼和數據集將在 https://github.com/Zhixin-L/TIPO 上公開發布。
2604.11259.author: Zhixin Lin et.al.
2604.11259.authors: Zhixin Lin, Jungang Li, Dongliang Xu, Shidong Pan, Yibo Shi, Yuchi Liu, Yuecong Min, Yue Yao
